name: lyrics_video
description: Music lyrics video — word-synced text over a background (video or color). JSX overlays always used for preview. At render time, renderMode controls whether Puppeteer (JSX) or ffmpeg drawtext is used.
agent_notes: INPUT PARSING: Parse the user prompt for 'Lyrics file: <path>' and 'Background video: <path>'. Both may be absent.
PATH RULE: If NO background video is present → use JSX path only. Never set renderMode when there is no base video.

PATH RULE: If background video is present → choose JSX or ffmpeg. For fast burn with no animation, use ffmpeg path (set renderMode: 'ffmpeg-drawtext'). For animated text with full preview, use JSX path (leave renderMode unset).
PREVIEW: Both paths use lyric-phrase.jsx overlays in tracks[1] for UI preview. The overlays ARE the preview — they are skipped at render time when renderMode is set.
CAPTIONS: Always set project.json captions from lyrics_sync output. This is used by the render.js ffmpeg branch. Even in JSX path, captions are the source of truth for overlay construction.

OVERLAY CONSTRUCTION (both paths): Convert each lyrics_sync segment into an overlay entry in tracks[1]: { id, type: 'overlay', src: '<montaj_root>/render/templates/overlays/lyric-phrase.jsx', start: seg.start, end: seg.end, props: { words: seg.words, variant: '<variant>', transparent: <bool>, ... } }. For JSX path, transparent:true when base video present.

FFMPEG PARAMS: When using ffmpeg path, store render params on captions object: captions.position ('center'|'top-left'|'bottom-left'), captions.color (default 'white'), captions.fontsize (default 72), captions.bgColor (default 'black', only used if no base video).
TRACKS[0]: If background video provided, tracks[0] = [{ id, type:'video', src: <abs_path>, start:0, end:<duration>, inPoint:0, outPoint:<duration> }]. If no background video, tracks[0] = [].

AUDIO: Set audio.tracks to an array with one entry for the song: { id: 'music', src: <abs path to song>, start: 0, end: <song duration>, inPoint: <audioInPoint from lyrics_sync output>, volume: 1.0, label: 'song' }. Use montaj probe to get song duration.
RESOLUTION: Default 1080x1920 (portrait). Use settings.resolution from project or let agent choose based on source video aspect ratio.
STATUS: Set project.status to 'final' before render. The render engine will reject non-final projects.
